name: Ham Barbecue Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the frankfurter rolls in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Remove from the heat and cover; refrigerate until serving time.
To Grill:
4. Place each frankfurter roll on a 10-inch length of heavy-duty foil.
5. Fill each roll with about 1/3 cup of the ham mixture.
6. Securely wrap each roll into a loose packet.
7. Grill, 4-inches from medium heat coals (medium heat).
8. Cook for 20 minutes, turning often with tongs.
